message:
bench: add config hot-path and retry backoff benchmarks

config_hot_path: benchmarks Config::from_toml parsing at 3 sizes,
PaneFilterConfig::check_pane with 0/5/50 rules and match positions,
PanePriorityConfig::priority_for_pane, and Config serialize/deserialize
round-trips. These are called per ingest event.

retry_backoff: benchmarks RetryPolicy::delay_for_attempt across attempt
numbers, all policy presets, full retry sequences (3/10/31 attempts),
and jitter vs no-jitter overhead. Called for every retry of every
fallible I/O operation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -457,6 +457,14 @@ harness = false
 name = "cass_search_ops"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "config_hot_path"
+harness = false
+
+[[bench]]
+name = "retry_backoff"
+harness = false
+
 [[test]]
 name = "proptest_daemon"
 path = "tests/proptest_daemon.rs"
